WORK=/tmp/tmp.luljZSvHNG

# Generate leaf key
openssl genrsa -out "$WORK/tls.key" 2048 2>/dev/null

# Create CSR with all required SANs
cat > "$WORK/san.cnf" << 'EOF'
[req]
req_extensions = v3_req
distinguished_name = req_dn
prompt = no

[req_dn]
CN = es-http

[v3_req]
keyUsage = critical, digitalSignature, keyEncipherment
extendedKeyUsage = serverAuth, clientAuth
subjectAltName = @alt_names

[alt_names]
DNS.1 = localhost
DNS.2 = es-http
DNS.3 = es-http.elasticsearch
DNS.4 = es-http.elasticsearch.svc
DNS.5 = es-http.elasticsearch.svc.cluster.local
DNS.6 = *.elasticsearch.svc
DNS.7 = *.elasticsearch.svc.cluster.local
EOF

openssl req -new -key "$WORK/tls.key" -out "$WORK/tls.csr" -config "$WORK/san.cnf" 2>/dev/null

# Sign the leaf cert with the CA (1 year)
cat > "$WORK/ca.cnf" << 'EOF'
[v3_ca_sign]
keyUsage = critical, digitalSignature, keyEncipherment
extendedKeyUsage = serverAuth, clientAuth
subjectAltName = @alt_names

[alt_names]
DNS.1 = localhost
DNS.2 = es-http
DNS.3 = es-http.elasticsearch
DNS.4 = es-http.elasticsearch.svc
DNS.5 = es-http.elasticsearch.svc.cluster.local
DNS.6 = *.elasticsearch.svc
DNS.7 = *.elasticsearch.svc.cluster.local
EOF

openssl x509 -req -days 365 \
  -in "$WORK/tls.csr" \
  -CA "$WORK/ca.crt" -CAkey "$WORK/ca.key" -CAcreateserial \
  -out "$WORK/tls.crt" \
  -extensions v3_ca_sign -extfile "$WORK/ca.cnf" 2>/dev/null

# Verify the leaf cert
openssl x509 -noout -text -in "$WORK/tls.crt" | grep -A15 "Validity\|Subject:\|Subject Alternative"
echo "---"
openssl verify -CAfile "$WORK/ca.crt" "$WORK/tls.crt"
